reviews.comment:
Buena atención. El estado de los sanitarios y la limpieza es muy buena. Hay un supermarket completo con servicio de cafetería y comidas, también juegos para chicos, posta de inflado de neumáticos y varios sitios con mesas, piletas para lavar y buena sombra. Se accede mano hacia BS AS. Mano a Mar del Plata hay que tomar el ingreso a la ciudad de Dolores y luego doblar a la derecha.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. The restrooms are in very good condition and clean. There's a full supermarket with a cafeteria and food service, as well as a children's play area, a tire inflation station, and several picnic areas with tables, sinks for washing up, and good shade. Access is via the road towards Buenos Aires. To reach Mar del Plata, take the entrance to the city of Dolores and then turn right.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURDMXFIemNREAE

reviews.comment:
El lugar cuenta con los servicios necesarios hay un lugar para descansar lindando el lugar . Los baños limpios . A la noche en el shop no podes comer  una hamburguesa etc una pena . El personal del playón honestamente dejan mucho que desear no se les cae una sonrisa ni un gesto de amabilidad ni por casualidad .... 👎

(Translated by Google)
The place has the necessary amenities; there's a place to rest right next to it. The bathrooms are clean. Unfortunately, you can't get a burger or anything like that at the shop at night. The staff at the parking lot honestly leave much to be desired; they never crack a smile or show any kindness, not even by chance. 👎
